name: Grid.GridAttributes
summary: The GridAttributes class is the attributes class for the grid.

constructors.name: Grid.GridAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default grid attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Grid.GridAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new grid attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributesFile
params.doc: The filename of the attributes file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: DrawOnlyTextLabelsNotGrids
properties.summary: Set as true if you don't want to draw the grids, only show the grids' text labels.

properties.name: DrawTextAtBottomOfGrid
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the bottom of the grid.

properties.name: DrawTextAtLeftOfGrid
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the left of the grid.

properties.name: DrawTextAtRightOfGrid
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the right of the grid.

properties.name: DrawTextAtTopOfGrid
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid's text labels at the top of the grid.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: The frame attributes of the grid's labels.

properties.name: OffsetAtEndOfLine
properties.summary: The offset for the end of the grid lines.

properties.name: OffsetAtStartOfLine
properties.summary: The offset for the beginning of the grid lines.
